blended.narrative: Alpine Valley Ohio is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 72°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 69°F.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
